backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as a placeholder backend canister with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five implemented features: extending PianoKeyboard to C6, adding C6 to fingering chart, updating playback for C6, displaying C6 in sheet music, and replacing lyrics placeholder with '+' buttons.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend source files describing components, utilities, hooks, and types for the Ocarina Composer application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for the application's design tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx for the React application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component managing composition state (notes, playback, metadata), ocarina preferences (hole/body shapes), fingering chart with localStorage persistence, and settings dialog with modal popup.
frontend/src/components/CompositionContr: Control panel for note duration selection, play/stop functionality using Web Audio API with synthesized ocarina tones (including C6 at 1046.50 Hz), and composition clearing.
Interactive dialog for configuring custom fingering patterns per note (including C6) with visual hole toggling, note selection grid, and reset functionality using consistent hole layout.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright information and attribution link to caffeine.ai with UTM tracking parameters.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Renders a sticky header with a gradient music icon and the title 'Ocarina Composer' with a subtitle describing it as a 4-hole ocarina melody creator.
frontend/src/components/HolePositioningE: Provides an interactive editor for positioning ocarina holes on a photo background with drag-and-drop support for both mouse and touch events, including save and reset functionality.
Manages ocarina customization settings including hole shape, body shape, color customization, photo upload/removal, fingering chart editing, and hole positioning with reset capabilities.
frontend/src/components/OcarinaTablature: Displays a compact tablature diagram showing which holes should be covered for a given pitch, with customizable hole shapes and colors based on the fingering chart.
frontend/src/components/OcarinaVisual.ts: Renders a large visual representation of the ocarina with interactive hole positions that highlight based on the current note being played, supporting custom photos and shapes.
frontend/src/components/PianoKeyboard.ts: Displays an interactive piano keyboard with white and black keys (C to C6) that triggers note selection callbacks when clicked.
frontend/src/components/SheetMusic.tsx: Shows composed notes as musical symbols with duration, pitch labels, ocarina tablature, and editable lyrics, supporting note selection, deletion, and playback highlighting.
frontend/src/components/SongMetadata.tsx: React component for editing and saving song metadata (title, description) with validation and local browser storage, displaying a warning that backend storage is not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the ICP actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, creating authenticated or anonymous actors and invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomHolePosition: Custom hook for managing custom ocarina hole positions with localStorage persistence, allowing users to override default positions or reset to defaults based on body shape.
frontend/src/hooks/useFingeringChart.ts: Custom hook for managing the ocarina fingering chart configuration with localStorage persistence, allowing updates to individual note patterns and reset to defaults.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Comprehensive React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useOcarinaColors.ts: Custom hook for managing ocarina visual colors (hole fill/stroke, body fill/outline) with localStorage persistence and default amber/gray color scheme.
frontend/src/hooks/useOcarinaPhoto.ts: Custom hook for managing user-uploaded ocarina photos, converting files to data URLs and persisting them in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder React Query hooks for future backend integration, currently returning empty arrays for song data queries.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a comprehensive design system for light and dark themes with amber/brown color palette.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility function combining clsx and tailwind-merge for conditional CSS class name composition.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the main App component.
frontend/src/types/fingering.ts: TypeScript type definitions for 4-hole ocarina fingering patterns, including hole identifiers, fingering patterns, and note names from C to C6.
frontend/src/utils/defaultFingeringChart: Default fingering chart configuration for a 4-hole pendant ocarina with C as the base note (all holes closed) and standard fingering patterns for all chromatic notes.
frontend/src/utils/holeLayout.ts: Utility for calculating consistent hole positions for ocarina visualization based on body shape, defining symmetric layout for left/right and index/middle finger holes.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system with CSS variables, custom fonts (Inter, Poppins), container settings, border radius variables, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state document describing a 4-hole ocarina tablature app with features including piano keyboard input, standard sheet music notation, ocarina fingering visualization (2x2 layout with configurable hole/body shapes), sound playback, note editing, lyrics support, and real-time visual feedback during playback.
